The '''''Wavecrest''-class frigate''' was a model of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] designed by the [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] of [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

''Wavecrest''-class frigates participated in the Confederate [[Operation Durge's Lance]]. Following the [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]], these Givin ships patrolled the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] alongside [[Geonosian dreadnaught]]s and [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|Banking Clan]] [[Munificent-class star frigate/Legends|''Munificent''-class Star Frigates]].

Givin combat engineers had previously towed asteroid bodies into position to prevent safe [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel throughout the Trade Spine. This artificial maze was made navigable by Separatist ships, like the ''Wavecrest''s, thanks to the Givin's [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]] calculations made in [[12th-degree hyperometry]] and [[Helrossi-principal Octratics]] equations.
